page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.24xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated physical cores and 96 vCPUs, utilizing an x86_64 architecture with a single thread per core. The processing power is driven by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor operating at a base frequency of 2.25 GHz.

The instance is configured with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 50 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource distribution, this server is designed for workloads requiring consistent compute performance without hyperthreading interference. It is suitable for enterprise applications, web serving, database hosting, and general-purpose business-critical workloads that benefit from high network throughput and dedicated AMD EPYC processing cores.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.24xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 96 dedicated vCPUs and 96 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at 2.25 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. With a single thread per core configuration, it delivers dedicated, non-shared processing power. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. It contains no local storage or GPUs, relying entirely on external storage solutions. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 50 Gbps. This instance is optimized for enterprise applications, web serving, and database workloads requiring consistent, non-burstable CPU performance and high network throughput.
